text:
10a. Sub-clause (iii) substituted by the Companies (Share Capital and Debentures) Third
Amendment Rules, 2015, w.e.f. 6-11-2015. Prior to its substitution, said sub-clause read
as under :
"(iii) 'Infrastructure Debt Fund Non-Banking Financial Companies' as defined in clause (b) of
direction 3 of Infrastructure Debt Fund Non-Banking Financial Companies (Reserve Bank)
Directions, 2011;"
section_title: 10a. Sub-clause (iii) substituted by the Companies (Share Capital and Debentures) Third
